positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of a majestic, fantastical nebula creature, resembling a blend of deep-sea bioluminescence and cosmic gas clouds. The creature should be centered and composed in a dramatic, symmetrical pose, emitting soft, vibrant neon blues, magentas, and electric cyan. Use thick, clean outlines (line art style) for high contrast against a deep black or midnight blue background. The overall aesthetic should be vaporwave meets mythic art, optimized for silkscreen printing, giving it a clean, graphic, and striking silhouette. Cinematic, high contrast, deep saturation, perfect for t-shirt print.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, lowres, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly rendered, grayscale, boring, pastel, cartoonish, realistic photograph
